test_output_summary: 4 passed in 1.68s (new tests), 502 passed in 15.12s (all relevant unit tests)
implementation_notes: Modified _attempt_state_recovery to accept an optional player_report dict parameter. Added logic before the existing test_scope fallback block: when player_report has a non-empty tests_written list, those paths are used directly as test_paths passed to capture_state. The existing test_scope extraction from task frontmatter is now wrapped in 'if test_paths is None:' so it only runs when the player report does not supply test paths. Updated the single call site at line ~1855 to pass player_result.report as player_report=player_result.report. Created focused unit test file tests/unit/test_state_recovery_scoping.py with 4 tests covering all specified scenarios.
requirements_addressed: When player report has tests_written list, use those paths for CoachVerifier test run
Fall back to full worktree run when player report is unavailable or has no tests_written
Unit test: Verify test_paths are extracted from player report when available
Unit test: Verify fallback to None (full run) when player report lacks tests_written

completion_promises.criterion_text: When player report has tests_written list, use those paths for CoachVerifier test run
completion_promises.evidence: Added 'if player_report and player_report.get("tests_written"): test_paths = player_report["tests_written"]' before the test_scope fallback block in _attempt_state_recovery. The call site now passes player_result.report as player_report parameter.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Fall back to full worktree run when player report is unavailable or has no tests_written
completion_promises.evidence: Wrapped the existing test_scope extraction in 'if test_paths is None:' so it only runs as a fallback. When test_scope is also absent, test_paths remains None which triggers a full worktree run in MultiLayeredStateTracker.

Ran 502 tests across test_state_recovery_scoping.py, test_state_tracker.py, and test_agent_invoker.py - all pass. State recovery tests in test_autobuild_orchestrator.py also pass (2 selected, 2 passed).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit test: Verify test_paths are extracted from player report when available
completion_promises.evidence: test_player_report_tests_written_used_as_test_paths verifies that capture_state is called with the exact paths from player_report["tests_written"].

completion_promises.criterion_text: Unit test: Verify fallback to None (full run) when player report lacks tests_written
completion_promises.evidence: Three fallback tests: test_player_report_none_falls_back_to_task_frontmatter, test_player_report_without_tests_written_falls_back, and test_player_report_with_empty_tests_written_falls_back. All verify that test_paths falls back to the task frontmatter test_scope value.
